Consultation.title: Library Consultation
Consultation.description: A request for a library service or book recommendation.

uid.description: The user ID of the requester.

name.description: The full name of the requester.

email.description: The email address of the requester.

phone.description: The phone number of the requester.

serviceType.description: The type of library service requested.

message.description: A brief message describing the inquiry.

status.description: The current status of the request.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the request was created.

User.title: User Profile
User.description: The profile information for a registered user.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

Podcast.title: Saved Podcast
Podcast.description: A podcast generated and saved by a user.

userId.description: The user ID of the owner.

script.description: The full script of the podcast.

audioUrl.description: The URL to the generated audio file.

imageUrl.description: The URL to the podcast cover image.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the podcast was saved.

BookAnalysis.title: Book Analysis
BookAnalysis.description: An analysis of a book generated by the AI.

userId.description: The user ID of the owner.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the analysis was saved.
